build.buildCommand: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' turbo --filter "./packages/**" build && cd apps/www && ./node_modules/.bin/contentlayer2 build && NODE_ENV=production ./node_modules/.bin/tsx --tsconfig ./scripts/tsconfig.scripts.json scripts/build-registry.mts && ./node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i ./src/app/globals.css -o ./public/tailwind.css --minify && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' ./node_modules/.bin/next build && cd ../.. && cp -r apps/www/public apps/www/.next/standalone/apps/www/public && mkdir -p apps/www/.next/standalone/apps/www/.next && cp -r apps/www/.next/static apps/www/.next/standalone/apps/www/.next/static
